## Summary

What changed, in plain language?

## Why This Change Belongs Here

Explain the problem being addressed and why it fits the repository's current scope.

## Change Type

- [ ] theorem or proof refinement
- [ ] no-go / falsification result
- [ ] physics or application extension
- [ ] workbench improvement
- [ ] validation / reproducibility
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] maintenance

## Proof Status Impact

Does this change affect any claim status?

- [ ] no status change
- [ ] proved result clarified
- [ ] statement narrowed
- [ ] statement strengthened
- [ ] conditional result added
- [ ] rejected or dead-end direction documented
- [ ] open problem clarified

If yes, list the relevant claim IDs or files.

## Validation

What did you run?

```bash
./scripts/validate/run_all.sh
```

List any narrower checks here as well.

## Scope and Limits

What does this change not prove or not claim?

## Reviewer Notes

Anything a reviewer should look at first?
